# 软件包请求 (Package Request)

## 先决条件 (Prerequisites)

- [ ] 我已确认这个软件包没有在[其他 issues](https://github.com/RuyiRepo/issues/issues)中提出过。I am sure that this package has NEVER been discussed in [other issues](https://github.com/RuyiRepo/issues/issues).

## 软件介绍 (Summary)

(简明扼要地介绍希望新增的软件包。Please provide a concise and clear introduction to the software package you wish to add.)

## 源代码仓库 (What you expected to happen)

(请提供软件包的源代码托管仓库地址。Please provide the source code repository address of the software package.)

## 期望的版本范围 (How to reproduce it)

(请提供期望添加软件包的版本范围，指明具体版本号或者提供版本范围。Please specify the desired version range for the software package to be added, indicating either the exact version number or providing a version range.)

## 环境 (Environments)

(如对操作系统、架构、包管理器等有特殊需求，请补充说明。If there are specific requirements regarding the operating system, architecture, package manager, etc., please provide additional details.)
